title: Skin Care Products catalog app (browse, search, manage products)

requirements.text: Create a skin care product data model and persistent storage in the Motoko backend, including fields: id, name, brand, category (e.g., cleanser/serum/moisturizer/sunscreen), skinType (e.g., oily/dry/combination/sensitive), keyIngredients (list of strings), concerns (list of strings), price (number + currency string), description, usageInstructions, and imageUrl (string).
acceptanceCriteria: Backend exposes a stable Product type with the specified fields.
Products are stored persistently across canister upgrades (using stable storage patterns).
Each product has a unique id generated by the backend.

requirements.text: Implement backend canister methods to manage products: listProducts (with optional query parameters for search text, category, skinType, concerns, minPrice, maxPrice), getProductById, createProduct, updateProduct, and deleteProduct.
acceptanceCriteria: Anonymous users can call listProducts and getProductById successfully.
createProduct/updateProduct/deleteProduct are available as separate methods and validate required fields (at least name, brand, category).
listProducts supports filtering and returns results deterministically (stable ordering, e.g., by name then id).

requirements.text: Add simple authorization rules: only authenticated users (via Internet Identity principal) can create, update, or delete products; anonymous users can only browse.
acceptanceCriteria: When unauthenticated, create/update/delete calls fail with a clear error message.
When authenticated, create/update/delete calls succeed.
Browse calls work regardless of authentication state.

requirements.text: Build a React UI for browsing skin care products: a home/catalog page that shows a product grid/list with product image, name, brand, category, skinType, and price, plus a search input and filter controls (category, skin type, concern, price range).
acceptanceCriteria: Catalog page loads products from the backend and renders a list/grid.
Search and filters update the displayed results (client-side or server-side) without full page reload.
Empty states are shown when no products match (English text).
Loading and error states are handled (English text).

requirements.text: Add a product details view that opens from the catalog (route or modal) and displays all product fields, including description, key ingredients, concerns, and usage instructions.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a product navigates to or opens a details view.
Details view fetches the product by id and shows a loading state while fetching.
If the product id is invalid/missing, show a clear 'Product not found' message (English).

requirements.text: Add an authenticated management UI for products: when signed in, provide screens/forms to create a new product and edit/delete existing products, including client-side validation for required fields.
acceptanceCriteria: When signed out, management actions are hidden or disabled and the UI prompts the user to sign in.
When signed in, user can create a product via a form and see it appear in the catalog.
When signed in, user can edit and delete a product and see changes reflected after success.
Form validation messages are in English and prevent submission when required fields are missing.

requirements.text: Use React Query for product fetching/mutations with proper cache invalidation after create/update/delete so the catalog and details stay in sync without manual refresh.
acceptanceCriteria: Product list query refetches or updates after create/update/delete.
Product details query updates after an edit.
No stale UI remains after successful mutations.

requirements.text: Establish a coherent visual theme for the app (colors, typography, spacing, components) suited to a skin care catalog—clean, minimalist, warm neutral palette—and apply it consistently across catalog, filters, details, and forms (Tailwind + existing UI components).
acceptanceCriteria: Pages share consistent typography, spacing, and component styling.
Theme avoids blue/purple as primary brand colors.
UI is readable and accessible (sufficient contrast, clear focus states).

requirements.text: Add generated static image assets to the frontend and use them in the UI (stored under frontend/public/assets/generated): app logo and a homepage hero/banner illustration.
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images exist under frontend/public/assets/generated with the specified filenames.
Home page displays the hero image and the app header/navbar displays the logo.
Images are loaded as static assets from the frontend (not served via backend).

constraints: Use English for all user-facing text.
Backend must remain a single Motoko actor (no additional backend services).
Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui or any immutable hook paths; compose them instead.
nonGoals: Third-party authentication providers other than Internet Identity.
Real-time updates, chat, or push notifications.
External database or indexing/search service integration.

required: Minimalist skincare app logo, line-art style, warm neutral palette (skincare-logo.dim_512x512.png)
Clean hero illustration featuring abstract skincare bottles and botanical elements, soft warm neutrals, lots of whitespace (skincare-hero.dim_1600x600.png)
